# OpenCode Runtime Notice

Literary Engineering Studio can package the OpenCode command-line runtime as an optional Agent Runner.

- Project: OpenCode
- Source: https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode
- Pinned version: 1.18.3
- License: MIT
- Copyright: OpenCode contributors

The release builder must include the upstream MIT license beside the bundled executable. Studio uses OpenCode as a separately managed local process and does not copy its application source code.
